The customer wrote:
---
Hi, this is Anne. Hello customer support team, I am interested in subscribing to your service and would like to know more about the different payment options available. Could you please inform me if you accept credit cards, PayPal, or bank transfers? Additionally, I would appreciate information on any discounts or promotions for annual subscriptions, as well as details on any additional fees related to specific payment methods. I look forward to your response and any further information you can provide. Thank you for your assistance, and I am excited about the prospect of becoming a subscriber to your service.
---
The agent replied:
---
We accept credit card, PayPal, and bank transfer. Annual subscriptions get 15% off versus monthly billing, and there's a flat $2 processing fee only on bank transfers -- cards and PayPal have none. You can pick your plan and payment method on the Billing page under Account Settings.
---

affect the score.

Hi, this is Brendan. Hello Customer Support, I am reaching out to inquire about how to optimize our digital marketing strategies using GitHub. Could you provide detailed information on how effectively utilizing GitHub can enhance our online presence and reach a wider audience? I am very interested in learning about the tools and features that GitHub offers to support our digital marketing efforts. Specifically, I would like to know how we can leverage GitHub to improve our website's visibility, drive more traffic, and increase engagement with our target audience. I'd recommend enabling Pages for a project landing page, adding relevant topics to your repo, and cross-posting release notes to your blog. Happy to review your repo setup directly.
---
